title: Vehicle Controller Subsystem Static Attributes
description: Static attributes of the vehicle control system, responsible for handling driving inputs, steering control, etc.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference path, used for editor intelligent suggestions and validation

basic_durability.description: Subsystem basic durability, becomes paralyzed when reduced to 0, restores functionality when repaired to 30% durability.

pass_damage.description: Whether to pass damage to the subsystem holder. If true, damage received by the subsystem will be transferred to the sub-part.

limit_damage.description: Whether to limit damage transfer value to the subsystem's remaining durability. For example, 40 damage with 20 remaining durability will only transfer 20 damage to the holder.

hidden.description: Whether to hide the subsystem in HUD displays, commonly used for purely providing model part damage differentiation for non-functional subsystems

steering_center.description: Steering center position, relative to the part's local coordinate system.

min_steering_radius.description: Minimum steering radius, in meters. Used for steering limits at low speeds and when handbrake is applied.

oneOf.description: Lateral acceleration limit, in m/s². Used to calculate steering radius in real-time based on speed (radius = speed² / acceleration).
Speed-lateral acceleration mapping table, where keys are speed (km/h) and values are corresponding lateral acceleration limits (m/s²). Supports linear interpolation.

lateral_acceleration.description: Lateral acceleration limit, in m/s². Used to calculate steering radius in real-time based on speed (radius = speed² / acceleration).

oneOf.description: Maximum drift angular velocity, in rad/s. Used as the target value for PD controller during drifting.
Speed-maximum drift angular velocity mapping table, where keys are speed (km/h) and values are corresponding maximum drift angular velocity (rad/s). Supports linear interpolation.

max_drift_angular_velocity.description: Maximum drift angular velocity, in rad/s. Used as the target value for PD controller during drifting.

manual_gear_shift.description: Whether to enable manual gear shifting. If false, automatic shifting is used.

auto_hand_brake.description: Whether to automatically apply handbrake. Automatically applies handbrake when vehicle is stationary and no input is given.

drift_assist.description: Whether to enable drift assist. Automatically assists in maintaining drift state when the vehicle is turning.

control_inputs.description: List of control input signal keys, from highest to lowest priority.

on_destroyed.description: Sound event when the subsystem is destroyed.

on_activate.description: Sound event when the subsystem is activated.

examples.description: Complete example - includes all optional fields
Advanced example - using mapping tables, drift assist disabled
